Description
recoder.service
This package contains the semantical services of RECODER.

    Returns the array type for the given base type.
    ArrayType
    NameInfo.createArrayType(Type basetype, int dimensions)
    Returns the array type for the given base type with the given dimensions.
    ArrayType

    ArrayType

    Returns the array type for the given base type, if it already exists.
